india_trends.summary: India's luxury market is expanding beyond traditional metro hubs as wealth and consumer exposure grow. india_trends.summary: Paisalo Digital says it is moving to embed artificial intelligence across its entire credit lifecycle — from customer acquisition and onboarding to underwriting, collections and portfolio monitoring

india_trends.title: UK inflation rises to 3.3% as Iran war impact begins to hit
india_trends.summary: UK inflation rose to 3.3% in March from 3.0% in February, driven by higher fuel prices amid Middle East tensions. The increase, slightly above expectations, has prompted forecasts of further inflation pressure, though the Bank of England is still expected to hold interest rates steady in the near te

india_trends.title: Rs 92,000 crore ripple effect! HCL Tech’s weak Q4 drags IT pack; Infosys, Tech Mahindra slump up to 6%
india_trends.summary: HCL Technologies’s weak Q4 triggered a ₹92,000 crore sell-off in IT stocks, dragging peers like Infosys and Tech Mahindra down up to 6% amid sector-wide concerns.

india_trends.title: USFDA issues Form-483 with 5 observations to Ajanta Pharma's Paithan facility
india_trends.summary: Ajanta Pharma said the US FDA has issued Form-483 with five observations after inspecting its Paithan manufacturing facility in Maharashtra from April 13–21, 2026. The company stated it will respond within the stipulated timeframe, while noting that Form-483 is issued when inspectors observe potenti

india_trends.title: FPI Exodus: Financial sector sees over ₹19,000 crore outflows in April; IT, FMCG, Auto also hit
india_trends.summary: FPIs have sold Indian equities worth ₹48,141 crore in early April 2026, with financial services hit hardest. The ongoing West Asian conflict influences global equity markets, creating volatility in FPI flows, while select sectors like power experience slight inflows amidst broader downturns.

india_trends.title: Crude oil prices remain unchanged after 9% gains in last two sessions. What's the near-term outlook?
india_trends.summary: Oil prices were mostly unchanged on Wednesday, after an initial rise of around $1 in early Asian trading. Here's what experts say on oil prices' near-term outlook.

india_trends.title: Vedanta Demerger Explained: From listing timeline, price discovery to passive flows - all you need to know
india_trends.summary: Vedanta demerger record date is May 1, 2026. The company’s board of directors have fixed May 1 as the demerger effective date and the demerger record date for determining the shareholders eligible to receive shares in the newly carved-out businesses.

india_trends.title: Oil, AI, and Uncertainty: What’s really driving global markets right now
india_trends.summary: Speaking to ET Now, Stephen Innes from SPI Asset Management described the environment as one driven not by peace, but by a temporary pause in escalation.

india_trends.title: Nestle India share price jumps 3% to hit record high post strong Q4 results FY26: What brokerages have to say
india_trends.summary: Nestlé India achieved a 23% YoY revenue increase and maintained EBITDA margins at 26.3%. While Elara Capital raised its target price, analysts show mixed views on the stock's valuation. The company continues to focus on strong fundamentals and execution amidst a challenging commodity landscape.

india_trends.title: Tesla Model Y L Launched in India: Check Price, specifications, features and colour options
india_trends.summary: The Tesla Model Y L has been launched in India with an extended wheelbase, premium features, advanced tech, and fast charging, positioned between Tesla’s high-end and more affordable offerings.

india_trends.title: Can Netflix afford to skip ads in India any longer?
india_trends.summary: While most Indian streaming platforms have adopted hybrid ad-supported and subscription models due to high churn, Netflix remains an ad-free outlier. Despite global ad revenue growth and a successful ad-supported tier elsewhere, India's unique market dynamics and Netflix's premium positioning are ke

india_trends.title: Capital inflows in Indian real estate rise 72% to record $5.1 bn in January-March: CBRE
india_trends.summary: Of the total capital inflows during January-March, real estate developers constituted around 42 per cent, closely followed by REITs at about 40 per cent. Investments by REITs surpassed USD 2 billion.

india_trends.title: Lupin launches generic anti-diabetic tablets in US
india_trends.summary: Pharma major Lupin has launched its generic anti-diabetic medicine in the United States. The medicine is dapagliflozin and metformin hydrochloride extended-release tablets. The US Food and Drug Administration approved the drug. Lupin's product is bioequivalent to Xigduo XR. This launch offers a new

india_trends.title: Morgan Stanley reiterates ‘Overweight’ rating on TCS, sees 10% upside potential
india_trends.summary: Tata Consultancy Services is gaining attention after Morgan Stanley reiterated an “Overweight” rating with a ₹2,880 target, implying ~10% upside. Despite short-term pressure on the stock, the brokerage expects a recovery in growth and potential valuation re-rating, signalling a possible turnaround.

india_trends.title: Short-term fluctuations, including FDI outflows closely monitored: RBI's Sanjay Malhotra
india_trends.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra addressed financial leaders in New York, assuring them that short-term economic fluctuations are being closely watched. He detailed ongoing reforms aimed at boosting foreign investment and market integration. The Reserve Bank highlighted India's robust economic fundament

india_trends.title: Industrial decarbonization hinges on capital cycles, not just clean energy: Jindal Stainless' Kalyan Bhattacherjee
india_trends.summary: Decarbonizing heavy industry is less about clean energy and more about long asset cycles that lock in emissions for decades.
